subcodes.first_line: O Dhabíh! In the Persian tongue mention is made, that whosoever willeth may attain unto its meaning this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذبیح بلسان پارسی ذکر میشود هر نفسی اراده نماید بمعنی آن فائز گردد الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
